title: Jamaican Apricot Crumble
description: A sweet and indulgent dessert with a crunchy oat topping.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the fresh and dried apricots.
In a separate bowl, mix the fluffy, indulgent, and two Jamaican ingredients.
Pour the dry ingredients over the apricot mixture and toss until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix the bake ingredients.
Spread the crunchy oat topping over the apricot mixture.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream, if desired.
